summary: Added Stage 3D planning SQLite project adapter detection, read-only open-candidate extraction, project seeding integration, focused fixture tests, and durable planning/handoff evidence.

tests_run.command: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_projects.py -q -p no:cacheprovider
tests_run.summary: 18 passed; covered generic registry behavior, planning SQLite adapter selection, read-only open-candidate extraction, project-seed-tasks apply behavior, corrupt database findings, terminal-row filtering, and target no-mutation checks.
Planning integrity checks passed with the Stage 3D task claimed for implementation.
Story Loop status reported Stage 3D as the current running task before completion was recorded.
392 passed plus Ruff, format, mypy, CLI smoke checks, file justification, public hygiene, planning integrity, skill inventory, source inventory, protected locks, and uv lock --check.

Adapter selection identifies nlp-stock-p.evidence: PlanningSQLiteAdapter is selected before GenericRepoAdapter when plans/planning.sqlite3 has the recognized tasks table shape; current generic repos with unrelated planning DBs continue to fall back to generic_repo.

The adapter reads target planning SQLite.evidence: The adapter opens target databases with a SQLite mode=ro URI, limits open candidate reads to MAX_PLANNING_SQLITE_TASK_CANDIDATES, reports corrupt or unsupported databases through adapter_findings, and tests assert target database bytes remain unchanged.

Open target planning tasks become determ.evidence: Ready/pending/blocked target tasks map to planning-sqlite-* ProjectTaskCandidate records with plans/planning.sqlite3 source authority, task contract fields, stable source IDs, and terminal target tasks filtered before the candidate limit.

project-list and project-seed-tasks JSON.evidence: Existing project-list serialization uses the new adapter facts, and focused tests apply planning SQLite adapter candidates into a separate supervisor planning DB while preserving the target DB bytes.

Focused tests cover valid planning SQLit.evidence: tests/test_projects.py now contains eighteen focused tests covering the named Stage 3D behavior plus existing Stage 3A-C project registry behavior.

Planning SQLite and HANDOFF.md record th.evidence: plans/planning.sqlite3 records the Stage 3D task shape and worker run, and HANDOFF.md records the shaped and completed Stage 3D evidence, checks, risks, and next action.

review.summary: Fresh-thread-style local review found one actionable edge case: terminal tasks could consume the candidate row limit before open tasks were considered. The query now filters to open statuses before applying the bound, with a regression test. No further actionable findings remained after focused and full verification.

risks: Stage 3 is not fully complete: markdown plan, harness/config, and insights graph adapters remain future slices.
The planning SQLite adapter intentionally recognizes one bounded tasks-table shape; broader nlp-stock-prediction schema variants may need follow-up support when real fixture evidence is available.
Live Codex Exec launch remains unavailable in this Windows shell because the resolved WindowsApps codex.exe path returns Access is denied.
follow_up_tasks: Shape and implement the observe-safety-monorepo structured markdown plan adapter.
Shape and implement codex-subagent-testing harness/config and tech-resume insights graph adapters.
Expand the planning SQLite adapter if real nlp-stock-prediction schema evidence differs from the public fixture shape.
handoff_notes: Stage 3D adds the first named adapter slice. Continue Stage 3 with the markdown plan, harness/config, and insights graph adapters before Stage 11 MCP.
